'''Hadis Alto''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and one of the first cadets to pass through the [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]] [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]]. A level-headed, unremarkable [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]], Alto served several tours of duty in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], honing his skills as a sniper and VIP bodyguard.

==Biography==
In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], he returned to Corulag and served as an undercover agent assigned with tailing, monitoring, and discreetly protecting valuable scientists, technicians, and engineers. He was still serving in this capacity when the [[Death Star II/Legends|Second Death Star]] was [[Battle of Endor/Legends|destroyed]].<ref name="Coruscant and the Core Worlds" />
